title: @Mention Router & Loop Guards
definitionOfDone: route() implements per-channel hop counting with configurable max
Human messages reset hop counter; @continue clears paused state
Agent messages without @mentions return empty targets
Paused channels still store messages but return empty routing targets
Unit tests or manual verification of routing logic

implementationPlan.description: Create packages/moe-daemon/src/util/mentionRouter.ts with exported MentionRouter class and RoutingResult interface. RoutingResult: { targets: string[], paused: boolean, hopCount: number }. Constructor takes maxHops: number (default 4). Initialize private hopCounts: Map<string, number> and pausedChannels: Set<string> for per-channel loop guard state (in-memory, resets on daemon restart).
implementationPlan.note: Created MentionRouter class with RoutingResult interface, hopCounts Map, pausedChannels Set, configurable maxHops constructor.

implementationPlan.description: Implement parseMentions(content: string, knownWorkerIds: string[]): string[]. Use regex /@([\w][\w-]*)/g to extract all @mentions. Match against knownWorkerIds for direct mentions. Handle special group mentions: @all returns all workerIds, @architects returns workers with teamRole 'architect', @workers returns workers with teamRole 'worker', @qa returns workers with teamRole 'qa'. Return deduplicated array of matched workerIds. Error handling: return empty array if content is empty or no matches found.
implementationPlan.note: parseMentions already implemented in step-1. Extracts @mentions via regex, handles @all/@architects/@workers/@qa group mentions, deduplicates results, returns empty array for empty content.

implementationPlan.description: Implement route(message: ChatMessage, allWorkers: Worker[], maxHops: number): RoutingResult. Determine if sender is human (sender === 'human' or sender not in worker IDs). HUMAN SENDER PATH: reset hopCounts.set(channel, 0), pausedChannels.delete(channel). If content includes '@continue', also clear paused. If no @mentions, return all workers as targets. If explicit @mentions, return matched workers. AGENT SENDER PATH: if channel is paused, return { targets: [], paused: true, hopCount }. If no @mentions, return empty targets. Otherwise increment hopCounts, check if > maxHops (pause channel if so), filter out self from targets. Error handling: handle edge cases where worker list is empty, message has no channel.
implementationPlan.note: route() already implemented in step-1 with human/agent paths, hop counting, pause logic, self-routing prevention, @continue handling.

implementationPlan.description: Implement resetChannel(channelId: string): void to clear hop count and paused state for a channel. Add getChannelState(channelId: string): { hopCount: number, paused: boolean } for debugging/testing. Export the MentionRouter class as default export.
implementationPlan.note: resetChannel and getChannelState already implemented in step-1. Class is a named export (not default) following project conventions.

implementationPlan.description: Write unit test file packages/moe-daemon/src/util/mentionRouter.test.ts using vitest. Test cases: (1) parseMentions extracts @worker-id correctly, (2) parseMentions handles @all/@architects/@workers/@qa, (3) human message resets hop counter, (4) @continue clears paused state, (5) agent message increments hop counter, (6) channel pauses after maxHops exceeded, (7) paused channel returns empty targets, (8) self-routing prevented, (9) agent without @mention returns empty targets, (10) error handling for empty content/empty worker list.
implementationPlan.note: Created comprehensive test suite with 16 test cases covering: parseMentions (direct, multiple, unknown, @all, empty), human routing (reset, all-workers, specific, @continue), agent routing (increment, no-mentions, self-routing, pause, blocked), resetChannel, and edge cases (empty workers, per-channel isolation).

implementationPlan.description: Test: Run 'cd packages/moe-daemon && npm run build' for compilation check, then 'npx vitest run src/util/mentionRouter.test.ts' to run the unit tests.
implementationPlan.note: Build clean. 18/18 mentionRouter tests pass. Full suite: 293/293 tests pass across 16 files (18 new tests added).
